query:
SELECT 
            user_id,
            COUNT(*)::int as "common_paths!",
            AVG(overall_progress_percentage) as "avg_progress!"
        FROM learning_path_progress
        WHERE learning_path_id = ANY($1)
        AND user_id != $2
        AND status = 'completed'
        GROUP BY user_id
        HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
        ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
        LIMIT 20
